title: 频率副词
prompt_en: Practice using adverbs of frequency: always usually often sometimes never.
description: 掌握频率副词的含义和词序(be动词后/实义动词前)。
knowledge_points: 频率副词 词序 习惯

title: 程度副词
prompt_en: Practice using adverbs of degree: very quite rather extremely too.
description: 掌握程度副词修饰形容词和副词的用法，区分程度强弱。
knowledge_points: 程度副词 修饰 强弱

title: 方式副词
prompt_en: Practice adverbs of manner: carefully quickly happily easily well.
description: 掌握方式副词(adj+ly)的构成和位置(动词后)。
knowledge_points: 方式副词 构成 位置

title: 评论副词
prompt_en: Practice comment adverbs: luckily frankly honestly surprisingly obviously.
description: 掌握评论副词放在句首修饰全句的用法。
knowledge_points: 评论副词 句首修饰 态度
